name: Save your best friend before the horrible NTR R*** !
description:
You and Yuuki Mikage (your only friend in the school) have been kidnapped by four bastards on Kyoko’s orders (the girl who bully you and hate Yuuki's strong behavior so much). If you don’t act quickly, Yuuki will suffer the same horrible fate as in the original doujin

Source : KEIKEI | GLARING by hirano kawajuu

God, I HATE THIS STORY ! FUCK IT ! Time for Justice, Anon ! (I also write a description for Kyoko in this bot)
creator: Crocorible11
